title: SpaceSMP Panorama
description: The Resource Pack for the custom SpaceSMP Panorama, updated every minecraft version!
body:
The resource pack used in the SpaceSMP modpack, but standalone. It gets updated every minecraft update. The bases shown in order are as follows:
- Dynamic_K (1.21.10)
- ObsidianMace (1.21.11)
- ObsidianMaceShopping District (26.1.2)

If you'd like to support us indirectly, feel free to use our affiliate link for UltraServers. They're the host we use on the SpaceSMP server. 
https://ultraservers.com/aff.php?code=SpaceSMP
